Flow.description: v3 update to end of flow v2 - updates to hide buttons Screenflow to gather expense Budgets for Application
Flow.label: Expense Budgets (Screenflow)

fields.name: Display_Expense_Help
fields.fieldText: Input an Expense report from {!Year_of_Budget} and the Associated Amount. If you have more, click Add and then do the same. Click Finish when all expense reports have been added.

fields.name: Revenue_Help
fields.fieldText: Input an Revenue report from {!Year_of_Budget} and the Associated Amount. If you have more, click Add and then do the same. Click Finish when all expense reports have been added.

fields.name: Instructions_Year
fields.fieldText: Input the Year of the Budget you are wanting to use for the Application
